abilities.description: You are hunted by a power or authority. When you make a move, you may improve the result to a strong hit. If you do, mark a box below to represent hunters closing in. On the third mark, a notable foe or force has tracked you down. If you overcome them or escape, reset the clock and mark 1 tick on your quests legacy track.
When you make a move to hide, conceal your identity, or flee from a pursuer, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.985a5415860a99e9]{Fulfill Your Vow} (extreme or greater) by clearing your name or defeating the power or authority who marked you as a fugitive, gain this ability at no cost. You may then exchange this asset for another with the same number of marked abilities.
